# Flint & Beam

## Project
Flint & Beam is a handcrafted lighting brand based in Sonoma, California. Each piece is built to order in our workshop using time-honored techniques. Raw brass, hand-blown glass, California hardwoods. No mass production — every fixture is one of a kind.

## Key pages
- [Home](/) — Artisan lighting, hand-finished in California
- [Shop All](/products) — Browse our full collection of handcrafted fixtures
- [About](/about) — Our story, workshop, and craftsmanship philosophy
- [FAQ](/faq) — Frequently asked questions about ordering, shipping, and care
- [Contact](/contact) — Get in touch with our Sonoma workshop
- [Cart](/cart) — Review your selected pieces
- [Checkout](/checkout) — Complete your order
- [Wishlist](/wishlist) — Saved pieces you love
- [Search](/search) — Find the perfect fixture
- [Track Order](/track-order) — Follow your build from workshop to doorstep
- [Privacy](/privacy) — Privacy policy
- [Terms](/terms) — Terms of service
- [Shipping](/shipping) — Shipping information
- [Refund](/refund) — Returns and refunds
- [Sign In](/auth/signin) — Account sign in
- [Register](/auth/register) — Create an account
